coming_soon.title: Pokémon: Chaos Rising (ME04) - Elite Trainer Box (German)

scripts.format: Best odds at the chase: Booster Box vs ETB vs Bundle (positive statistical value)
scripts.why_today: The German ETB/Bundle/Blister (Wachsendes Chaos) are 'Coming soon' on the site, so the value comparison ends with a NATURAL slight CTA: those exact products are coming back soon - turn on the alert if you don't have one yet. The connection is intrinsic (we just compared them). Not hype, not insider, not price.

slides.title: Welches Produkt gibt dir die beste Chance auf Mega-Quajutsu? 👀
bullets: Booster Box, ETB oder Bundle - ich brech's runter
slides.title_en: Which product gives you the best chance at Mega Greninja (Quajutsu)?
bullets_en: Booster Box, ETB or Bundle - I'll break it down
slides.direction: Selfie hook (Lea). Curiosity question, upbeat. No store, no urgency.

slides.title: Erstmal: wie selten ist die Chase?
bullets: Die Mega-Hyperrare ist die seltenste Karte im Set
Die SIR-Version zieht man deutlich öfter
Heißt: mehr Booster = mehr echte Chancen
slides.title_en: First: how rare is the chase?
bullets_en: The Mega-Hyper-Rare is the rarest card in the set
The SIR version is pulled far more often
So: more packs = more real chances

slides.title: Booster Box (36 Booster)
bullets: Beste Chance auf eine SIR oder die Hyperrare
Teuerste Option, aber bester Preis pro Booster
bullets_en: By far the most packs
Best chance at a SIR or the Hyper-Rare
Priciest option, but best price-per-pack
slides.direction: Show a sealed Wachsendes Chaos display.

slides.title: ETB / Top-Trainer-Box (9 Booster)
bullets: Weniger Booster, dafür Sleeves, Box & Würfel
Grad übrigens als 'Coming soon' auf IvoryShard 👀
bullets_en: Fewer packs, but sleeves, box & dice
Solid middle-ground odds
BTW listed as 'Coming soon' on IvoryShard right now
slides.direction: Show the ETB. Natural mid-deck (slide 4) store touch: the German ETB is genuinely 'Coming soon' on the site. Reinforced lightly on the final slide.

slides.title: Booster Bundle (6 Booster)
bullets_en: Cheapest entry point
Lowest chase odds, but lowest risk
Perfect for dipping a toe in

slides.title: Mein Fazit
bullets_en: Best chase odds: Booster Box
Best fun-per-euro: ETB
Lowest risk: Bundle
slides.direction: Clean verdict slide. NO IvoryShard here - a pull-odds comparison doesn't fit a store mention naturally, and today's German signal is only mild, so this stays pure value.

cta.on_screen: Übrigens: ETB, Bundle & Blister kommen bald wieder auf IvoryShard 👀 Benachrichtigung an, falls du noch keins hast
cta.en: BTW: the ETB, Bundle & Blister are coming back soon on IvoryShard - turn on the alert if you don't have one yet.

scripts.shot_list: S1 selfie. S2 Mega-Quajutsu-ex card. S3 sealed display. S4 ETB + contents. S5 booster bundle. S6 verdict over the 3 products. CTA slide: the 'Coming soon' Wachsendes Chaos products on the IvoryShard page. The store appears once, as a natural coming-soon heads-up.

scripts.format: Chaos Ascendant: 5 things to know before buying (diverse buyer's guide, not all price)
scripts.why_today: A French Chaos Ascendant Booster Bundle is IN STOCK NOW, so the buyer's-guide ends with an 'available now' nudge - NOT a restock alert (you don't tell people to set an alert for something they can buy this second). 5 diverse value tips + a natural availability CTA naming IvoryShard. No scarcity, no price/scalper framing.

slides.title: Chaos Ascendant : 5 trucs à savoir avant d'acheter 👀
slides.title_en: Chaos Ascendant: 5 things to know before buying
bullets_en: The new Mega Evolution expansion
slides.direction: Selfie hook (Chloé). Value/curiosity, works even if you never shop.

slides.title: 1. La star du set : Méga-Amphinobi-ex
bullets: Une des cartes les plus chères du set
slides.title_en: 1. The set's star: Mega Greninja (Amphinobi) ex
bullets_en: One of the most expensive cards in the set
Several hundred euros as a single
The ETB features it on the box
slides.direction: Show the Mega-Amphinobi-ex card + the ETB artwork.

slides.title: 2. Les autres cartes à viser
bullets: La SIR d'AZ pour les fans de lore
Y'a de quoi faire au-delà d'Amphinobi
bullets_en: Mega Floette ex & Mega Dragalge (Kravarech) ex
AZ's SIR for the lore fans
Plenty to chase beyond Amphinobi
slides.direction: Show 2-3 of these cards as reference.

slides.title: 3. Quel produit pour quelle chance
bullets: Le Bundle FR est dispo là maintenant sur IvoryShard 👀
bullets_en: Display (36 packs) = best SIR odds
ETB = good mix of packs + extras
The FR Bundle is in stock right now on IvoryShard
slides.direction: Show the 3 product types. Natural mid-deck (slide 4) store touch: the FR Booster Bundle is genuinely in stock NOW. Reinforced lightly on the final slide.

slides.title: 4. Check la cote avant d'acheter
bullets: Le jour 1 c'est gonflé, ça redescend vite
Pas besoin de paniquer, c'est dispo partout
slides.title_en: 4. Check the market price before buying
bullets_en: Look at the Cardmarket price in EUR
Day 1 is inflated, it drops fast
No need to panic - it's available everywhere
slides.direction: Show a Cardmarket price lookup on the phone.

slides.title: 5. Protège direct ce que tu pull
bullets: Sleeve tes belles cartes tout de suite
Loin du soleil et de l'humidité
slides.title_en: 5. Protect what you pull, right away
bullets_en: Sleeve your good cards immediately
Toploader for the big ones (alt, SIR)
Away from sun and humidity
slides.direction: Pure value care tip. No store mention here.

cta.on_screen: Et si tu veux le tester, le Booster Bundle FR est dispo là maintenant sur IvoryShard 👀
cta.en: And if you want to try it, the FR Booster Bundle is available right now on IvoryShard.

scripts.shot_list: S1 selfie. S2 Amphinobi card + ETB. S3 other chase cards. S4 three product types. S5 a binder/sleeves/toploader. CTA slide: the FR Booster Bundle product page (it's in stock now). Store appears once, as an availability nudge.

scripts.format: What I'd grab from the new set: coming-soon picks for rippers vs collectors (beginner guide)
scripts.why_today: Playful, curiosity-led beginner guide: 'if you only buy one thing from the new set, here's what I'd grab' split by ripper vs collector. The German Wachsendes Chaos products are 'Coming soon', so the natural slide-4 + CTA touch is a light 'they're coming back soon - alert on'. Warm, relatable voice with curiosity hook.

slides.title: Wenn du bei Wachsendes Chaos nur EINE Sache kaufst… 👀
bullets: Spoiler: kommt drauf an was du willst 🖤
slides.title_en: If you only buy ONE thing from Chaos Rising…
bullets_en: Spoiler: it depends what you want
slides.direction: Selfie hook (Mila), playful + curious expression. No store, no urgency.

slides.title: Erstmal: worum geht's im Set?
bullets_en: Mega Quajutsu (Greninja) ex is the big chase
Mega Evolution is THE 2026 theme
Plus strong SIRs + a Mega-Hyper-Rare

slides.title: Du willst einfach aufmachen? 🙏
bullets_en: Grab the Booster Bundle (6 packs)
Cheap entry, loads of fun
Perfect for dipping in
slides.direction: Show a booster bundle in hand.

slides.title: Du willst sammeln & sealed halten?
bullets: ETB sieht mega aus + Sleeves & Box
Die DE-Versionen kommen grad bald wieder auf IvoryShard 👀
bullets_en: The ETB looks great + sleeves & box
Display = the most packs
The German versions are coming back soon on IvoryShard
slides.direction: Show an ETB + a display. Natural slide-4 store touch: the German ETB/Bundle/Blister are genuinely 'Coming soon' on the site. Reinforced lightly on the CTA.

slides.title: Mini-Tipp den ich früher nicht wusste 💡
bullets: Schau VOR dem Kauf die Cardmarket-Cote an
Day-1 ist oft gehyped, pendelt sich ein
Kein Stress - das Set gibt's überall
slides.title_en: A mini-tip I didn't know earlier
bullets_en: Check the Cardmarket price BEFORE buying
Day 1 is often hyped, then it settles
No stress - the set's available everywhere
slides.direction: Show a Cardmarket price lookup on the phone.

slides.title: Mein Fazit 🖤
bullets_en: Ripping → Bundle
Collecting → ETB or Display
Main thing is you enjoy it
slides.direction: Warm selfie sign-off. No store mention here.

cta.on_screen: Die DE-Wachsendes-Chaos-Produkte (ETB, Bundle, Blister) kommen bald wieder auf IvoryShard 👀 Benachrichtigung an, dann verpasst du's nicht 🙏
cta.en: The German Chaos Rising products (ETB, Bundle, Blister) are coming back soon on IvoryShard - turn on the alert so you don't miss it.

scripts.shot_list: S1 selfie, playful curious face. S2 Mega-Quajutsu-ex card. S3 booster bundle in hand. S4 ETB + display on the shelf. S5 Cardmarket price lookup on phone. S6 warm selfie sign-off. CTA slide: the 'Coming soon' Wachsendes Chaos products on IvoryShard. Store appears once as a natural coming-soon heads-up.
